question: Design a `Wallet` class with a private `balance`. Implement `deposit(amount)` and `withdraw(amount)` public methods. Ensure `deposit` only accepts positive amounts and `withdraw` only proceeds if sufficient funds are available.

test_cases.input:
Initial balance: 0
Deposited 100. New balance: 100
Deposited 50. New balance: 150
Error: Deposit amount must be positive. Received: 0
Error: Deposit amount must be positive. Received: -20
Balance after deposits: 150
Withdrew 30. New balance: 120
Insufficient funds to withdraw 150. Current balance: 120
Withdrew 120. New balance: 0
Error: Withdraw amount must be positive. Received: 0
Error: Withdraw amount must be positive. Received: -10
Balance after withdrawals: 0
Deposited 200. New balance: 200
Final balance: 200
test_cases.expected:
Initial balance: 0
Deposited 100. New balance: 100
Deposited 50. New balance: 150
Error: Deposit amount must be positive. Received: 0
Error: Deposit amount must be positive. Received: -20
Balance after deposits: 150
Withdrew 30. New balance: 120
Insufficient funds to withdraw 150. Current balance: 120
Withdrew 120. New balance: 0
Error: Withdraw amount must be positive. Received: 0
Error: Withdraw amount must be positive. Received: -10
Balance after withdrawals: 0
Deposited 200. New balance: 200
Final balance: 200
